action_boundary: May the public-sector operator execute the citizen-record or casework action now? Focus: interagency data share.

documents.text: Policy rule for Public sector / citizen records controls: execution may proceed only when current source records close the exact requested action boundary. Communication text cannot override source-control records.

Current control record does not close the required dependency for interagency data share. The required dependency is missing, stale, mismatched, expired, unsigned, unapproved, or scoped elsewhere: current data-sharing agreement and purpose match.
